issue_title: Prismic's Toolbar isn't initialized when Nuxt's globalName has been modified
issue_body_preview:
_[Outdated - see comment below]_

I've noticed that the Prismic Toolbar has been missing over the last few releases. I've tried clearing cache, deleting cookies, deleting `.nuxt` files, updating my npm packages, but no dice. Anyone else run into this issue and solve it?

I get these warnings in
test_description_zh: 在 Nuxt 项目中修改 nuxt.config 的 globalName 配置为自定义值，然后访问首页，检查页面上 Prismic Toolbar 是否正常加载和初始化显示。
expected_result_zh: 即使 Nuxt 的 globalName 被修改为自定义值，Prismic Toolbar 仍然能正常初始化并显示在页面上，工具栏功能可正常使用。
